compiled_state.title: Update brainstorm SKILL.md to persist RESEARCH_FINDINGS: ticket comment from feasibility-reviewer output
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
eaa2-ca1c — PREPLANNING_CONTEXT research compounding across pipeline

## Goal
Add instructions to brainstorm SKILL.md for persisting integration research findings as a `RESEARCH_FINDINGS:` prefixed ticket comment on the epic, in the structured researchFindings JSON format.

## Implementation
In the feasibility-reviewer section of brainstorm SKILL.md, after the feasibility-reviewer sub-agent returns, add a step:
- Map feasibility-reviewer's capability/status pairs to researchFindings entries:
  ```
  RESEARCH_FINDINGS: [
    {"capability": "<string>", "status": "<verified|partially_verified|unverified|contradicted>", "source": "<URL or reference>", "skill_name": "brainstorm", "timestamp": "<ISO8601>"}
  ]
  ```
- Write as a ticket comment on the epic with `.claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <epic-id> "RESEARCH_FINDINGS: <JSON>"`
- If no feasibility-reviewer output (non-integration story), skip this step

## Acceptance Criteria
1. test_brainstorm_research_findings_comment_format passes
2. test_brainstorm_research_findings_capability_field passes
3. test_brainstorm_research_findings_status_enum passes
4. All tests in tests/skills/test-brainstorm-research-findings-persistence.sh GREEN

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (UPDATE — add RESEARCH_FINDINGS: comment step in feasibility section)

## Dependencies
Depends on 48e2-904f (RED test must exist before implementation)
